notes: This worked from the onset of Proton, but very buggy and slow, but trying again with 3.16-6, it is very smooth in play, though appears very low res for playing on my 4k screen.  My only qualm is I can't seem to get my steam controller to work with it so far.  Going to try other controllers soon.
title: One Piece Pirate Warriors 3

notes: Game quality is great playing with 3.16 so far, at least when doing so with a keyboard.  Attempting to use a Logitech game pad, a F310, I'd get a constant spin to the right of the character in game play, that cannot be fixed or even disabled.  This seems to be a bug in the game however, as others have reported this for using game pads other than very specific ones (xbox360 apparently works).
title: One Piece Pirate Warriors 3

notes: Video file - Cutscenes doesn't play. Otherwise the games feels the same as Windows (including the no button layout when using controller and the controller not responding once disconnected once) 8/10
title: One Piece Pirate Warriors 3

cpu: AMD A10-7870K Radeon R7, 12 Compute Cores 4C+8G
